metadata.description: This is coming from the parameter File under Parameters
This is coming from the parameter File under Parameters

settings.name: SAPeLWriteInstance
settings.value: [concat('Server=',variables('primaryAzureSqlServerName'), if(contains(tolower(parameters('resourceNames').environment),'dev'),'',variables('dbName')),'.database.windows.net;', 'Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity; Encrypt=True; Database=', variables('dbName'))]

settings.name: SAPeLReadInstance
settings.value: [concat('Server=',variables('azureSqlServerName'),'.database.windows.net;', 'Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity; Encrypt=True; Database=', variables('dbName'))]

resources.comments: Only create the Database if this is the first deployment
resources.name: [concat('createSapelDataBase-', parameters('date'))]

resources.comments: IMPORTANT: This resource depends on the common network Azure Front Door to exist
resources.name: [concat('createSapelPublicEndPoint-', parameters('date'))]

resources.comments: Only deploy the database failover group if this is the primary region and the first deployment
resources.name: [take(concat('CreateSQSAPelFailoverGroup-',parameters('date')),60)]

filterRules.name: EventType
filterRules.comments: This subscription will be subscribed to and recorded into a Azure SQL DB for auditing purposes

filterRules.name: EventType
filterRules.comments: This subscription should be forwarded to the topic goodsreceipt.events
